name: chatlink-server
description: Bridge Claude Code to browser AI chats through a local, authenticated MCP server. No API keys required — uses your existing web sessions.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run lint:extractor && node --test dist/*.test.js
scripts.prepare: npm run build && npm run lint:extractor
scripts.lint:extractor: node --check ../chrome-extension/content-scripts/extractor.js && node --check ../chrome-extension/background.js && echo extractor.js + background.js syntax OK
